texto: I don't think I could, with a straight face, describe myself as a completely positive person, but I'm not overly negative, either. On the whole, most writers think plots through to their consequences, and it's not always a sunny place. I have an occupational temperament for anxiety.
explicacao: Citação de James Lasdun sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't think I could, with a straight face, describe myself as a completely positive person, but…” articula reflexao, myself, negative em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como negative e anxiety.

frase_original: I don't think I could, with a straight face, describe myself as a completely positive person, but I'm not overly negative, either. On the whole, most writers think plots through to their consequences, and it's not always a sunny place. I have an occupational temperament for anxiety.
